overall.description: A first-person perspective of someone walking along a narrow dirt path through grassland at night, illuminated by a warm flashlight. The footage shows a transition from a fenced corridor to open grassland as the camera holder walks steadily toward a distant tree line.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced dirt path through tall grass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a fenced dirt path at night, flashlight illuminating the ground ahead

entered.detail: rough wooden posts lining the left side of the path, creating a corridor
narrow dirt trail winding through the grassland
tall grass growing beyond the fence line
tall grass field on the right side of the path
dark silhouette of trees visible on the horizon against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow dirt path bordered by a wooden fence on the left and tall grass on both sides. The path is illuminated by a warm flashlight, revealing the texture of the dirt trail and grass while the surrounding area remains in darkness. A distant tree line is barely visible on the right horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail approaching tree line

events.description: exits the fenced corridor into open grassland as the wooden fence ends

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the path through open grassland toward the distant trees

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the fence disappears, revealing an expansive grassland at night. The dirt path continues through the center of the frame, flanked by tall grass on both sides. The tree line on the right grows larger and more defined as the camera approaches, while the flashlight continues to illuminate the immediate path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a narrow dirt path that transitions from a confined fenced corridor into an expansive nighttime grassland. It begins with the camera moving forward under the glow of a warm flashlight, which illuminates the texture of the trail and the tall grass bordering a wooden fence on the left. As the camera advances, the fence gradually disappears, allowing the scene to open up into a wide, dark field. The dirt path continues to lead the way through the center of the frame while the distant tree line on the right grows larger and more defined. Finally, the flashlight maintains a focused beam on the immediate ground as the camera steadily approaches the looming silhouette of the woods.
